content.en:
"With so much primeval golden blood, if it were given to me, I would definitely be able to practice the primeval technique of the primeval god and demon fist!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But he didn't dare to snatch it now, and occasionally any of the primeval demon apes here could easily kill him, the primeval demon ape, to copy the body.

At this moment, he was pondering how to obtain these primeval golden bloods.

Once these Ancient Golden Bloods were completely stabilized, the Ancient Demon Ape of the Seven Blood Transformation Realms would definitely personally send them back to the Ancient Demon Ape Headquarters.

At that point, it will be even more impossible for him to obtain.

Come to think of it, it seems that there is only one way.

"The White Shadow Elephant Clan!"

In terms of strength, the White Shadow Elephant Clan is definitely no less than the Ancient Demon Ape Clan, and the White Shadow Elephant Clan is also collecting the Ancient Golden Blood, if they knew the information here, would they make a move?

"Whatever happens, maybe you can try!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian copied the body of a three-blooded transformation realm creature and went to the White Elephant City as the other party to find the White Shadow Elephant Clan.

White Elephant City.

White Elephant Tower.

This is a shop belonging to the White Shadow Elephant clan, Ye Tian directly entered here, and named the person in charge here, and mentioned one word - Ancient Golden Blood.

Soon, a white shadow of the five Blood Transformation Realm appeared in front of Ye Tian.

He is the Tuohe of the White Elephant clan and the owner of this White Elephant Building.

Tuohe looked at Ye Tian and said, "Your Excellency has news of the Ancient Golden Blood?"

"Yes, and it's a lot of primeval gold!"

Ye Tian said.

"A large amount of primeval golden blood?" Tuohe was a little unconvinced, how rare is primeval golden blood, just a third-blood transformation realm creature, even if he finds a drop of primeval golden blood, he is very lucky, and he can still find a large amount of primeval golden blood?

Ye Tian continued: "I know that a place with a large amount of primeval golden blood has formed a primeval golden blood lake. I don't have the strength to take those primeval golden bloods, so I sold the news to the White Shadow Elephant clan. Don't worry if I deceive you, if I did, I wouldn't be able to get out of White Elephant City, would I?"

At this moment, Tuohe believed it a little.

"If the news is true, we can give you a million white elephant gold!"

One million white elephant gold is already a lot, and one news for one million white elephant gold, most of the blood transformation realm creatures have to be excited.

But Ye Tian felt that the White Elephant Clan was too stingy, how many drops of primeval gold could be bought for a million White Elephant Gold?

also felt that he was in the third blood transformation realm, so he just sent him with a million white elephant gold.

However, his purpose was not to earn these white elephant gold, but to make the primeval golden blood.

"Ancient gold blood in the ancient ruins!"

Ye Tian said.

Tuohe was stunned for a moment, and then said coldly: "Aren't you talking nonsense, everyone knows that the Ancient Ruins have Ancient Golden Blood, but there are many Blood Transformation Realm Demon Bodies in the Ancient Ruins, and the amount of Ancient Golden Blood is very small, and if you look for it, you may even fall a lot of Blood Transformation Realm creatures, so it is not worth looking for." If that's the news, you're good to go. "

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Of course the news is not this, the news I am talking about is that the Ancient Demon Ape Clan cultivated the Ancient Golden Blood in the Ancient Ruins, and blocked an area. They have captured an ancient race, used the blood of the ancient race, and cultivated the ancient golden blood in large arrays, and now they have succeeded!"

"What!"

Tuohe was shocked, if this news is true, it will be a big deal!

"Where did you get the news, if the Ancient Demon Ape blocked the news, it would be impossible for it to spread the news!" Tuo He asked.

"The big man behind me sent a Blood Transformation Realm creature to infiltrate it, and although it was discovered, it still passed the news out, and even passed on one picture after another. "

Immediately, Ye Tian waved his hand, and the pictures in the depths of the ancient ruins appeared.

"You wait here, and if the news is true, a million white elephant gold will definitely be given to you. "

Tuo He said, and went to the headquarters of the White Shadow Elephant Clan.

Because this matter is so serious that it must be reported.

......

The ancient treasure where the headquarters of the White Shadow Elephant Clan is located.

After Tuohe returned, he immediately met Chihe, the great elder of the White Shadow Elephant Clan.

"Great Elder, Tuohe is here!"

Tuohe stood in front of a palace and said.

"Come in!"

Chihe Road.

Tuohe went in and met the Great Elder Chihe.

"Tuohe, what's the matter, let you come back in person!"

Chihe was curious.

Tuohe has been staying in White Elephant City, and he has not come back for a long time, and as the owner of the White Elephant Pavilion, Tuohe is usually very busy.

It's not a big deal, Tuohe won't come back.

Tuohe immediately reported: "Great Elder, there is a news that the creatures of the Three Blood Transformation Realm are being sold, saying that among the ancient ruins, the Ancient Demon Ape Clan has blocked an area and secretly cultivated the Ancient Golden Blood. They seem to have succeeded, and have already cultivated a lot of primeval blood. "

Then, Tuohe conjured up the picture that Ye Tian gave him.

"Hey, isn't this the Ancient Monitor Lizard!"

Great Elder Chihe looked at the primeval monitor lizard in the picture in surprise and said in shock.

The primeval monitor lizard is a purebred primeval race that appeared a long time ago, and it is said that it was sealed in the primeval world, and it was not long after breaking through the seal, and it has the strength of seven blood transformation realms.

But suddenly, one day, the primeval monitor lizard weasel disappeared.

"Great Elder, do you think this matter is true?" asked Tuo He.

Chihe thought for a moment and said, "It's very likely, the Ancient Demon Ape Clan is indeed occupying an area in the Ancient Ruins, and the outside world doesn't know what happened, after all, even we don't want to offend the Ancient Demon Ape Clan." In addition, the primeval monitor lizard quiver has indeed disappeared, and there is a possibility that it will be caught by the primeval demon ape. More importantly, the Ancient Demon Ape Clan has indeed been trying to cultivate the Ancient Golden Blood. In fact, not only the Ancient Demon Ape Clan, but even we are trying to cultivate the Ancient Golden Blood. Unfortunately, we have not been successful. "

"In addition, the cultivation of the primeval golden blood by the primeval demon ape clan reminds me of the primeval golden turtle clan. The primeval golden beetle clan was not invaded by the primeval demon ape clan because of the primeval technique, it was said that the primeval golden beetle clan offended the primeval demon ape clan, but there is another theory, that is, the primeval golden beetle clan has made a new breakthrough in cultivating the primeval golden blood, which is why it was targeted by the primeval demon ape clan. In addition, over the years, the primeval demon ape clan has indeed destroyed a lot of races. If the research of the many races is successful, there is really hope that they will be able to develop the true primeval golden blood cultivation method. "

When Tuohe heard this, he asked, "Great Elder, what should we do now?"

"You don't have to worry about this matter, I'll go and ask the patriarch!"

"Yes!"

Tuohe retreated.
